title: DCF Valuation Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the DCF Valuation skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

historical_financials.description: Historical income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements (minimum 3 years)

revenue_growth_assumptions.description: Revenue growth assumptions for the explicit projection period (typically 5-10 years)

operating_margin_tax.description: Operating margin and tax rate assumptions for the projection period

weighted_average_cost.description: Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC) or discount rate

terminal_growth_rate.description: Terminal growth rate or exit multiple for terminal value calculation

current_net_debt.description: Current net debt position (debt minus cash) to bridge from enterprise value to equity value

segment.description: Segment-level revenue and margin projections (for multi-segment businesses)

management_guidance_analyst.description: Management guidance or analyst consensus forecasts as cross-checks on projection assumptions
